//: The posture/contract tests in this package read repo-level files OUTSIDE the package (.github/**, root docs + manifests). Turbo's default input hash covers only this package's own files + globalDependencies, so a change to e.g. a workflow file would leave a stale-green cached `test` result. The inputs below add those repo-level files to the hash. $TURBO_DEFAULT$ keeps the package's own files in the hash; $TURBO_ROOT$ escapes the package to reference repo-root paths. dependsOn/outputs are redeclared because a package task definition replaces (not field-merges) the root's.
